person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3.x); using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or a compile error if the javax artifact is not present.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update testcontainers version property to a version compatible with Java 21.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older testcontainers versions may lack support for newer Docker APIs or Java 21 runtime environments, causing runtime failures in integration tests.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok version to a version compatible with Java 21.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update instancio-junit to a major version supporting Java 21.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Major version updates often include bytecode changes or dependencies that require newer JDKs; older versions might not compile or run on Java 21.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update jib-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 build environment.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jib versions may fail to build images or handle Java 21 module system correctly during the build process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.4 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with Java 21 causes compilation errors or runtime failures due to deprecated APIs and module system changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.
